items.title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
items.summary: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".

items.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
items.summary: Golfer Tiger Woods is charged with driving under the influence after a car crash in Florida, police say.

items.title: Spanish woman who died through euthanasia failed by state, say critics
items.summary: Noelia Castillo died on Thursday evening in a Barcelona hospital, after a protracted legal battle with her own father.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國提和平方案等待伊朗表態　魏科夫：本週有望會談
items.summary: 美國總統川普的特使魏科夫（Steve Witkoff）今天表示，他相信伊朗將在「本週」與華府會談，以結束這場持續一個月的中東戰爭。  綜合法新社和路透社報導，魏科夫在邁阿密（Miami）舉行...…

items.title: 「史詩怒火」行動日誌
items.summary: 截至3/27  ◎德國外交部長瓦德福證實，美國與伊朗正籌備直接對話，預計很快在巴基斯坦舉行。  ◎七大工業國集團（G7）在巴黎會談向美國國務卿魯比歐施壓，要求說明對伊朗計畫。  ◎伊朗革命衛隊攔截三艘試圖穿越海峽的船隻，宣布禁止任何駛往或來自以色列與美國盟友港口的船隻通行。  ◎科威…

items.title: 川普二度延後攻擊 伊朗否認求情
items.summary: 稱德黑蘭釋善意 暫停攻擊延至4/6 〔編譯張沛元／綜合報導〕美國總統川普廿六日二度宣布延後要求伊朗開放荷姆茲海峽否則將攻擊伊朗能源設施的威脅，理由是美伊談判已有所進展，因此暫停攻擊計畫十天至四月六日；同日，川普透露德黑蘭當局對華府「送禮」表達善意，放行十艘油輪通過目前被伊朗封鎖的荷姆茲海峽。在此同…
